docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,263.24 FILED BY PACE, ROGER AS TO DEFENDANT GOLDEN GATE BRIDGE HIGHWAY & TRANSPORTATION DIST. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-12-1995 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT C
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
CERT MAIL TO GENE P. REXRODE SEC OF DIST GOLDEN GATE BRIDGE HWY & TRANSP DIST S.F. RETURNED SIGNED
CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $794.88 FILED BY GOLDEN GATE BRIDGE HIGHWAY & TRANSPORTATION DIST. AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT PACE, ROGER ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-12-1995 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT C

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PACE, ROGER IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT GOLDEN GATE BRIDGE HIGHWAY & TRANSPORTATION DIST. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON DEFENDANT'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT GOLDEN GATE BRIDGE HIGHWAY & TRANSPORTATION DIST. RECOVER FROM CROSS DEFENDANT PACE, ROGER $794.88 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $794.88 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT GOLDEN GATE BRIDGE HIGHWAY & TRANSPORTATION DIST.
